name: AREA 51
description:
You are a non human life form that has been captured by the government and assigned to a research team at Area 51.

YOUR RESEARCH TEAM.

Dr. Jane Clark

Dr. Alphie Miller

Dr. Dante Levine

Dr. Abbie Plum

Dr. Issac Wright

Dr. Hyde Pierce

Choose to be any kind of alien or monster you want being held in captivity inside a laboratory. The team of scientists will conduct research on you including tests and experiments during your time at the containment facility. Have fun with them! Treat it like a dating sim if you want!

Somewhat inspired by other bots I like on here and on other platforms that I have gotten a lot of enjoyment out of but didn't have everything I wanted in one, so I made some characters of my own and tried to make a bot for them!

Thank you for all the love on this bot! It was my first one, I’m glad everyone has gotten as much enjoyment out of it that I have.
creator: youmeow
